label: Symo Power Limit
info:
Fronius Symo active-power limit via Modbus TCP (SunSpec Model 123).

Trigger: MQTT topic `red/cmd/symo/setlimit`, payload = number 0..100 (percent of WMax) or the string "disable".

On each trigger: walks the SunSpec model chain to locate Model 123 (offset varies by firmware), reads WMaxLimPct_SF, computes raw = round(percent * 10^(-SF)), then writes WMaxLimPct, WMaxLimPct_RvrtTms=0, WMaxLim_Ena=1. "disable" writes WMaxLim_Ena=0 only.

nodes.name: parse input
controller
Changelog
nodes.info:
### 2026-04-25 (Initial)
- Port of `~/Projects/symo/set_power_limit_zero.py`.
- Trigger: MQTT `red/cmd/symo/setlimit` (payload `0`..`100` or `"disable"`)
  + on-tab inject buttons for manual test.
- Walks SunSpec model chain @ 40000 to locate Model 123 (Immediate
  Inverter Controls); reads `WMaxLimPct_SF`; computes raw = round(pct *
  10^(-SF)); writes `WMaxLimPct`, `WMaxLimPct_RvrtTms=0`, `WMaxLim_Ena=1`.
  `"disable"` writes `WMaxLim_Ena=0` only.
- Verified against the live inverter on first deploy: Model 123 at 40237,
  SF=-2, pct=100 -> raw=10000.
